title: XML parsers should not be vulnerable to XXE attacks
description: External Entity Processing allows for XML parsing with the involvement of external entities. However, when this functionality is enabled without proper precautions, it can lead to a vulnerability known as XML External Entity (XXE) attack. What is the potential impact? Exposing sensitive data One significant danger of XXE vulnerabilities is the potential for sensitive data exposure.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: XXE vulnerability: XML parser is configured with DTD processing enabled or with unsafe XmlResolver.

logic.reasoning: Detects XML parser configurations that enable DTD processing (DtdProcessing.Parse) or use XmlUrlResolver, which can lead to XXE (XML External Entity) attacks. Safe configuration requires DtdProcessing.Prohibit and XmlResolver = null.
